slides.headline: Your treatment memory.
slides.body: Track how each week goes. DoseDay organizes what matters so you can remember it later.

slides.headline: Ready for your appointment.
slides.body: No more arriving at the clinic without remembering the month. We generate a clear report for you to bring.

slides.headline: Let's begin.
slides.body: In a few minutes, DoseDay learns about you and prepares your treatment space.

accessibility.createAccountHint: Marks the introduction as seen and opens sign up
accessibility.signInHint: Marks the introduction as seen and opens sign in
